suite.name: Fields Basic Tests

kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_01: Danh Sách Sân Bóng Hiển Thị

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Danh sách sân bóng'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: Kiểm tra danh sách sân bóng có hiển thị

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_02: Có Thể Xem Sân Bóng

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: View Available Pitches
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Xem danh sách các sân bóng có sẵn

kw.name: Get Pitch Count
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.
Lấy số lượng sân bóng

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Kiểm tra có thể xem danh sách sân bóng

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_03: Có Thể Chọn Sân Bóng

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: View Available Pitches
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Xem danh sách các sân bóng có sẵn

kw.name: Get Pitch Name
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
Lấy tên sân bóng theo vị trí

kw.name: Select Pitch By Name
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//h5[contains(text(),'Sân Bóng Liên Chiểu')]/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'p-6')]//a[contains(text(),'Xem chi tiết')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Chọn sân bóng theo tên

test.doc: Kiểm tra có thể click vào sân bóng

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_04: Sân Bóng Hiển Thị Giá

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View

Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
Lấy tên sân bóng theo vị trí

kw.name: Get Pitch Price
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
Lấy giá sân bóng

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_05: Sân Bóng Hiển Thị Kích Thước

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
Lấy loại sân (5vs5, 7vs7, 11vs11)

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.name: TC_PITCH_SMOKE_06: Có Thể Lọc Sân Theo Kích Thước

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Filter Pitches By Size
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Lọc theo tab loại sân

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: Kiểm tra có thể lọc sân theo kích thước

kw.name: Close Browser Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Đóng browser

suite.name: Fields Selection Tests

kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
